TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Monaco, title = Monaco, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Monaco} }

S.FORM: Monaco hya' ga cyux maki' tay 43 44 N, 7 24 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 2 sq km (maki' tay 254ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 2 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 30,581. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 1% , lhlahuy hya' ga 0%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 99%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Monaco. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 19 na tay mawpuw qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Albert II, aring ryax 6 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2005 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Monaco hya' ga cyux maki' tay 43 44 N, 7 24 E na Oco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 2 sq km (maki' tay 254ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 2 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 30,581. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 1% , lhlahuy hya' ga 0%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 99%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Monaco. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 19 na tay mawpuw qutux byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Albert II, aring ryax 6 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2005 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: mona ¶~ ®o ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** e na o ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē * s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a * s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a *% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a mona ¶~ ®o. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mawpuw qutux ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a alő≤ert ii, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
